_comment: Generated by build/scripts/generate_media_inventory.py - regenerate rather than hand-editing current_* fields. owner_facts / proposed_* / approval_status fields ARE meant to be edited (by agreement with the owner) and survive regeneration.

placements.project_or_section: #1 Hardwood Floor Deep Cleaning with Bona Power Scrubber – San Diego Specialists
placements.current_alt: Professional hardwood floor deep cleaning service in San Diego with Bona Power Scrubber — safe for wire-brushed, textured, and smooth wood floors. Licensed San Diego Hardwoods crew removes years of buildup for a clean natural finish, better than Coit or Stanley Steemer.
placements.current_caption: Bona Power Scrubber deep cleaning on wire-brushed hardwood floors in San Diego. The dual white brushes scrub and extract years of dirt, polish residue, and buildup without sanding. This is the same professional dust-free system we use in La Jolla, Del Mar, Encinitas, and Rancho Santa Fe homes to restore clarity and natural tone in a single day.

placements.project_or_section: #10 Golden Hill Douglas Fir floor refinishing with dust containment — in another late 1800s historic apartment near downtown San Diego, San Diego Hardwoods used an industrial belt sander connected to a Bona portable dust containment system to strip away paint and years of wear from vintage Douglas Fir planks; the floors were then stained in a rich Jacobian color and sealed with a satin commercial-grade finish, leaving a spotless, durable restoration that proves the effectiveness of true dust-free sanding
placements.current_alt: Golden Hill hardwood floor refinishing San Diego historic apartment near downtown, vintage Douglas Fir wood floors from late 1800s shown during professional dust free sanding with industrial belt sander and Bona portable dust containment system, hardwood floor restoration and refinishing service by licensed San Diego flooring contractor

placements.project_or_section: #11 4S Ranch Brazilian cherry floor refinishing — this engineered cherry floor in North County San Diego, near Rancho Santa Fe and Carmel Mountain Ranch, was dust-contained sanded to remove its aluminum oxide coating, then sealed with a traditional oil-based sealer to deepen the rich cherry color and finished with a matte-sheen residential water-based coat; the result highlights the floor’s gorgeous detail, including custom cherry corner round, and restores decades of worn wood to like-new perfection
placements.current_alt: Hardwood floor refinishing 4S Ranch San Diego North County, engineered Brazilian cherry wood floors sun faded and worn, aluminum oxide factory finish sanded off with professional dustless sanding system before applying new stain and protective sealer by licensed hardwood flooring contractor

placements.current_visible_title: Hardwood Floor Deep Cleaning in San Diego | Bona Power Scrubber | Dirt and Polish Removal
placements.current_description:
Tired of dull or sticky hardwood floors?
This video shows San Diego Hardwoods performing a true deep cleaning using the Bona Power Scrubber — a professional dust-free system that removes dirt, polish buildup, and cleaning residue from wire-brushed and smooth floors without sanding.

Watch how our dual-brush scrubber lifts years of grime from the grain, then vacuums away the dirty solution — leaving your floors clean, dry, and ready for a new protective coat within hours.

✅ Safe for all hardwood finishes
✅ Dust-free and low-odor process
✅ Restores natural color and clarity
✅ Ideal maintenance between full refinish cycles

📍 Serving San Diego County, including La Jolla, Del Mar, Carmel Valley, Rancho Santa Fe, Encinitas, and Mission Hills.
📞 Call or text 858-699-0072 to schedule your deep cleaning consultation today.
